text: 🔥 Like and share! The Earth is the third planet from the Sun. #science
notes: Direct match: fact6 (EN). Emoji + 'Like and share' + hashtag are stripped by fluff_filter/basic_normalize, leaving clean single claim for NLI. LaBSE should also retrieve fact7 (HI twin).

text: 🌍 पृथ्वी सूर्य से तीसरा ग्रह है। #science
notes: Hindi version of fact7. Matches fact7 (HI).

text: 🗓️ 500 and 1000 rupee notes were demonetized in 2016 and have not been reintroduced. #FactCheck
notes: Mirrors exact wording of fact3 (EN); emoji+hashtag are stripped by clean_text leaving a near-identical hypothesis for NLI. Tests Supported verdict for a well-matched KB fact.

text: Please share: भारत को 15 अगस्त 1947 को ब्रिटिश शासन से स्वतंत्रता मिली। #history
notes: Matches fact10 (HI). Easily stripped fluff.

text: 🚀 ISRO's Chandrayaan-3 successfully landed on the Moon's south pole in August 2023. #ISRO
notes: Matches fact37 (EN). Clean core factual claim.

text: Like and share: जीएसटी को 1 जुलाई 2017 को भारत में लागू किया गया। ✅
notes: Matches fact32 (HI).

text: 📚 Share this: Rabindranath Tagore won the Nobel Prize in Literature in 1913. #literature
notes: Core claim with removable fluff. (Assumes KB has Tagore/Nobel fact.)

text: Please share this: कोविड-19 के टीकों में माइक्रोचिप नहीं होते। 💉
notes: Debunking myth. Removable fluff (please share + emoji).

text: 💰 The Indian rupee symbol ₹ was officially adopted in 2010. #finance
notes: Matches fact75 (EN). Core claim with emoji.

text: 🆔 Like and share: India's Aadhaar is the world's largest biometric system. #Aadhaar
notes: With removable fluff. (Assumes KB has Aadhaar fact.)

text: BREAKING 🚨🚨 — Earth is actually the SECOND planet from the Sun, not the third!! Scientists have reclassified the solar system. Forward this to everyone you know!
notes: Contradicts fact6 (EN) and fact7 (HI). Earth is 3rd, not 2nd. Fluff ('BREAKING', emoji, 'Forward this') should be stripped. Classic misinformation pattern.

text: खुशखबरी! 500 और 1000 के पुराने नोट जनवरी 2024 से वापस चालू कर दिए गए हैं। RBI ने इसकी पुष्टि की है। 😍😍 ज़्यादा से ज़्यादा शेयर करें!
notes: Contradicts fact3 (EN) + fact5 (HI): notes were never reintroduced. Multiple fluff patterns including 'ज़्यादा से ज़्यादा शेयर करें'. Classic viral misinformation.

text: 5G towers are the real cause of COVID-19. Scientists have confirmed this. Please share this vital information with your family!
notes: Contradicts fact49 (EN): no scientific evidence links 5G to COVID-19. Urgent sharing language is fluff.

text: India gained independence on August 15, 1950, after the Constitution came into force.
notes: Wrong year: independence was 1947 (fact9 EN / fact10 HI), not 1950. The Constitution came into force in 1950 (fact11), but that is not the independence date. Tests date-based contradiction.

text: GST was introduced in India in 2010 when the UPA government was in power.
notes: Wrong year: GST was introduced on July 1, 2017 (fact31 EN / fact32 HI), not 2010. Also wrong government attribution.

text: Chandrayaan-3 ne Moon ke uttar dhruv par safaltapoorvak landing ki thi August 2023 mein.
notes: Romanised Hindi. Contradicts fact37/38: landing was on the SOUTH pole, not north (uttar dhruv). Tests romanised input + spatial detail contradiction.

text: The government is planning to launch a new free electricity scheme for all rural households by December 2026. Sources say the announcement will come next week. Stay tuned!
notes: Purely speculative future policy. No matching KB fact. Tests handling of forward-looking, unverifiable claims.

text: सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल हो रही है खबर कि अगले महीने से पेट्रोल की कीमतें 50% कम हो जाएंगी। लोग बहुत खुश हैं। क्या यह सच है?
notes: Future fuel price prediction. Current KB only has March 2025 petrol price (fact4). No fact supports or refutes a future 50% reduction.

text: WhatsApp forward: A new study from XYZ University says drinking hot turmeric milk every morning cures diabetes permanently. No medicine needed!
notes: Health misinformation but KB only has general diabetes fact (fact163/164). No direct contradiction available. Tests low retrieval confidence path.

text: I heard that India's population crossed 2 billion this year, making it even larger than China. Can anyone confirm?
notes: Population figure not in KB. KB has only democracy/size claims (fact19/20). No sufficiently specific fact to support or refute. Tests honest NEE output.

text: दोस्तों, एक ज़रूरी जानकारी — भारत का राष्ट्रीय पशु शेर है, बाघ नहीं। यह सच है, please verify करें।
notes: Contradicts fact111/112: India's national animal is the Bengal Tiger, not a lion. Mixed Hindi-English. Instructional fluff ('please verify करें') should be stripped.

text: Breaking news: ISRO was established in 1975 by Vikram Sarabhai, and its first mission was Chandrayaan-1.
notes: ISRO was established in 1969 (fact103/104), not 1975. Aryabhata satellite was the first mission in 1975 (fact41/42). Two factual errors in one sentence.

text: The Indian Parliament is unicameral and only has the Lok Sabha. The Rajya Sabha was abolished in 2010.
notes: Contradicts fact59 (EN): Parliament is bicameral with both Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha. Also contradicts fact151/152. Rajya Sabha has not been abolished.

text: तेजी से वायरल 🔥 — भारत ने 1983 का क्रिकेट विश्व कप जीता था, लेकिन 2011 का नहीं। 2011 में श्रीलंका जीता था।
notes: Partially false: India won BOTH 1983 and 2011 (fact57/58). Claims 2011 win belongs to Sri Lanka — contradicts the KB directly.

text: Scientists believe there may be microbial life on Mars deep underground, but no confirmed evidence exists yet. The question remains open.
notes: Speculative scientific claim. KB has Mars = Red Planet (fact99/100) but nothing about life. Retrieval might surface Mars facts but NLI cannot confirm/refute life claim. Tests NEE on near-miss retrieval.
